ItacPersonItem.Notes: Giuseppe Artale became President of the Erranti Academy in Naples. For a biograpfy of Giuseppe Artale see Gesualdo Interligi, Studio su Giuseppe Artale, Catania, 1921 (British Library Shelfmark: 011851.cc.32.)
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
